## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up and explore potential collaboration between Rachael Tiow (Okta/Auth0) and Marcel Santilli (GrowthX.ai) for content and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rachael has returned to Okta/Auth0, focusing on revitalizing Auth0's content and growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai has grown significantly, now with 60 employees and $7.5M ARR, offering AI-powered content and growth solutions](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Potential collaboration areas: content refresh, SEO optimization, and custom growth workflows for Auth0](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Rachael to share 30-60-90 day plan for Auth0 growth initiatives to guide potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

## Topics

### Rachael's New Role at Okta/Auth0

  - [Returned to Okta/Auth0 after a brief stint at Transmit](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Title: Growth Experiment (similar to previous outbound engine role)](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Focus on revitalizing Auth0 content and growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Addressing challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Lack of content investment in Auth0 over past 3 years](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [AI tools (e.g., GPT) incorrectly summarizing competitors as superior](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [Limited access to AI tools due to public company restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### GrowthX.ai Update

  - [Grown to 60 employees](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Reached $7.5M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Hiring top talent from companies like Coinbase, Stripe, Airbnb, and Grammarly](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Developed proprietary AI-powered platform for content and growth workflows](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Working with clients like Abnormal Security and Sentinel One](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### Auth0 Content and Growth Needs

  - [Full-funnel approach: content creation to sales handoff](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Content refresh and optimization:](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [Update existing content (15,000+ pages) to align with new branding](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
      - [Create migration content for Akamai customers](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [Improve SEO and visibility on AI platforms (GPT, Claude, Grok)](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Develop growth experiments and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Pipeline optimization, especially for stage 2 to stage 4 conversions](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Leverage AI for data scraping and workflow building](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Content refresh and creation](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [SEO optimization and backlink strategy](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Custom growth workflows](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Outbound engagement flows (as an alternative to restricted internal tools)](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rachael to send 30-60-90 day plan for Auth0 growth initiatives to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Marcel to review plan and prepare tailored proposal with input from Jason (VP of Go-to-Market) and Kyle (Client Strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss proposal and prioritize initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Explore potential board-level support through Karan (GrowthX investor and former Auth0 board member)](https://fathom.video/share/GG8PGcNjzyS5dLVkVnAJsBL2e9yfVNwD?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
